channel.title: Microsoft.FileShares on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Microsoft.FileShares on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: File share centric management model (Microsoft.FileShares) for Azure Files
item.description:
The file share-centric management model for Azure Files is now generally available for NFS 4.1 shares on SSD storage. It uses the Microsoft.FileShares resource provider and makes file shares top-level Azure resources.

  • Source: Azure Updates
